partsUsed: Timber (conservation-sensitive); bark in some folk traditions
traditionalUsesEn: Premier cabinet timber; some regional folk bark uses; conservation concern.
traditionalUsesDe: Edles Nutzholz; regional volksmedizinische Rinde; Artenschutz relevant.
activeCompounds: Limonoids (related to neem chemistry), wood extractives
preparation: Timber industry; folk bark not standardized—prefer conservation.
cautions: CITES-listed trade restrictions. Not a casual medicinal.
historicalNotes: Colonial furniture wood that drove heavy Amazon logging.
